message:
fix(clippy): resolve 20 warnings in recording, export, process_triage, robot_types, session_pane_state, sharding, undo

- recording.rs: borrowed expression serde_json::to_value(&v) → to_value(v),
  many_single_char_names allow, clone_on_copy RecordingOptions
- export.rs: clone_on_copy ExportKind, manual_string_new, needless borrow
- process_triage.rs: strict f64 comparison → epsilon-based
- robot_types.rs: clone_on_copy ErrorCode
- session_pane_state.rs: manual_string_new
- sharding.rs: absurd_extreme_comparisons text.len() >= 0
- undo.rs: manual_string_new

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
